name: Warping Pull

spell.name: Warping Pull
spell.trigger: An effect would deal damage to an ally within range.
spell.targets: 1 willing creature that would take damage from the triggering effect

text: You get an ally out of danger with a teleporting pull. You teleport the target to an unoccupied square up to 10 feet closer to you. The target gains resistance 5 to all damage against the triggering effect.
